query: SELECT id, title, category, notes, photos FROM map_pins WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%fiber%' OR LOWER(notes) LIKE '%fiber%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%fibre%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%internet%' ORDER BY id DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user WBfVgvvEUxL2ZXR.root --database 5Wh7ynUieoKvKRb4ttPNaL --execute SELECT id, title, category, notes, photos FROM map_pins WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%fiber%' OR LOWER(notes) LIKE '%fiber%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%fibre%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%internet%' ORDER BY id DESC;
